calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Torreano.
Petitioner, Sheldon Perkins present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Shel Perkins.
Decree signed in open court.
